name: Nontaxable Use Fuel Exemption

eligibility.description: Fuel must be used for nontaxable purposes such as farming, off-highway business use, or use in trains, and must be properly dyed/marked.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts diesel fuel and kerosene from the 18.3/24.3 cent per gallon excise tax if the fuel is indelibly dyed and destined for a nontaxable use.
